creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->scheidell

I'll take it. 
Alan:  I believe the best way to do this is a 'robocopy'. 
You copy ../dbmail to ../dbmail-devel (or ../dbmail30), and just upload patches (diffs) between ../dbmail and dbmail30. 
that way, dbmail (22) history is preserved, and the trail going forward is maintained. 
Also, and it doesn't matter here, since you really want a robo copy.  new ports need a 'shar' uploaded. 
Don't do that here, I think we still want to do a robocopy. 
Upload your patches and I will see about getting them committed. 
Ports has a partial thaw now, so now is the time to do this.
